creative_brief: Split-screen visual: left side shows a long highway with a refrigerated truck and a '2,400km' overlay fading into grey; right side shows a vibrant NSW pasture with cattle and a short dotted line to a FarmThru hub. Clean, minimal text on image.
primary_text:
If your beef travelled 2,400km to reach you, someone else decided what "fresh" means.

Here's what that looks like: up to 21 days in cold storage. Passed through warehouses and wholesalers. The farmer who raised it? They never saw your order.

FarmThru flips that. We work with regenerative farms across NSW. Your beef is 100% grass-fed, days old when you collect it. No hormones, no feedlots, no middlemen.

No commitment. Order when you want. Collect from Brookvale Monday to Friday.

We're building something different. You can own a piece of it.
headline: 2,400km or farm-direct: you choose
description: Regenerative beef, days old not weeks. Zero warehouses, zero wholesalers, zero guesswork.
